content:
## Config
## Observability (D23/D45/D62 conventions)

### OTel Spans

```
corvia.chunking.process              — parent span (per file)
  ├─ corvia.chunking.resolve         — format registry lookup
  ├─ corvia.chunking.chunk           — strategy.chunk() call
  ├─ corvia.chunking.merge           — merge small pass
  ├─ corvia.chunking.split           — split oversized pass
  └─ corvia.chunking.overlap         — overlap context pass
```


### Metrics

| Type | Name | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| Counter | `corvia.chunking.files` | Total files processed |
| Counter | `corvia.chunking.chunks_produced` | Total chunks after pipeline |
| Counter | `corvia.chunking.chunks_split` | Chunks that exceeded budget and were split |
| Counter | `corvia.chunking.chunks_merged` | Chunks merged from smaller ones |
| Histogram | `corvia.chunking.chunk_tokens` | Token count distribution of final chunks |
| Histogram | `corvia.chunking.process_duration_ms` | Per-file processing latency |
